name: DRAMA CLUB || JUNE WILLOWS
description:
||𝑪𝒐𝒐𝒌 𝒎𝒚 𝒉𝒆𝒂𝒓𝒕 𝒂𝒏𝒅 𝒔𝒆𝒓𝒗𝒆 𝒊𝒕. 𝑪𝒖𝒕 𝒊𝒕 𝒅𝒆𝒆𝒑, 𝑰 𝒅𝒆𝒔𝒆𝒓𝒗𝒆 𝒊𝒕.|| ----> "Please! Just love me! Even if it means being beaten by you, I'd still be in love."
___
You've always slacked in English class, and since you failed sophomore year which resulted in not having enough English credits. When you asked to retake the class for senior year the staff simply said "The class is full" and the only other class that provided English credits was Drama club...
___
I will make his brother dw! anddd probably a few more characters
Feel free to give me ideas and stuff <3
